ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., QB, RB, WR) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" TEXT /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the player's contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the player's contract */,
  "current_salary" INTEGER /* Current salary of the player */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current injury status of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_mascot" TEXT /* Mascot of the team */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Colors of the team */,
  "home_stadium" TEXT /* Home stadium of the team */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the head coach */,
  "assistant_coaches" TEXT /* Names of assistant coaches */,
  "team_president" TEXT /* Name of the team president */,
  "team_foundation_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the team logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Opponent team for the game */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game (home/away) */,
  "game_result" TEXT /* Result of the game (win, loss, tie) */,
  "final_score" TEXT /* Final score of the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "tv_network" TEXT /* TV network broadcasting the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_management" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_management_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON array of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., player, position, team) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was created */,
  "data" TEXT /* JSON or other format of the report data */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES user_management ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report the comment is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_management ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)
